extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and toolbar.

extDescription.message: Conecta el editor de Kaiord con tus datos de recuperación y sueño de WHOOP mediante tu sesión abierta de WHOOP — sin app de desarrollador ni contraseñas.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store.

checking.description: Status text while the popup probes the session.

checkingAria.description: Accessible label for the checking status pill.

connectedToWhoop.description: Status text when a WHOOP session bearer has been captured.

connectedHint.message: Leyendo tus datos de WHOOP a través de tu sesión abierta.
connectedHint.description: Hint shown below the status when connected.

noSession.description: Status text when no WHOOP session bearer has been captured.

noSessionHint.message: Abre WHOOP y recarga la pestaña, luego vuelve a abrir esta ventana.
noSessionHint.description: Hint telling the user how to establish a session.

openWhoop.description: Button that opens app.whoop.com in a new tab.

openWhoopAria.description: Accessible label for the Open WHOOP button.
